hash_invariants.H1: All V0.2 artifacts must retain their original hash values under V0.3 validation.
hash_invariants.H2: Unified canonicalization must produce identical hash results for identical content across versions.
hash_invariants.H3: Version boundaries must remain hash-distinct; V0.2 and V0.3 artifacts cannot converge to the same digest.

identity_invariants.I1: V0.2 identity trees must remain unchanged under V0.3 validation.
identity_invariants.I2: V0.3 identity trees must be explicitly version-tagged and cannot inherit V0.2 identity roots.
identity_invariants.I3: Cross-version identity collapse is forbidden; V0.2 and V0.3 artifacts must remain distinguishable.
identity_invariants.I4: V0.3 artifacts must declare version identity explicitly in their metadata.

boundary_invariants.B1: V0.3 artifacts cannot be silently promoted to authority surfaces.
boundary_invariants.B2: V0.2 artifacts cannot be silently promoted to V0.3 authority surfaces.
